commands: echo '--- uninstall any stale torch/torchvision first ---'
/usr/bin/python3.11 -m pip uninstall -y --quiet torch torchvision torchaudio || true
echo '--- install matched torch+torchvision CPU builds (pinned) ---'
echo '--- install lpips last (picks up torchvision) ---'
/usr/bin/python3.11 -c 'import scipy, torch, torchvision, lpips; print("scipy", scipy.__version__, "torch", torch.__version__, "torchvision", torchvision.__version__, "lpips OK")'
